conflict: rent, work, partial repayments, and the impossibility of complete repair
consequence: Lena stops waiting for moral symmetry and starts building a life around an unrecoverable loss.
must_land_beats: The chapter must show concrete labor rather than summarized recovery.
Partial repayment from June should feel contaminating and necessary at once.
The sale of the trailer closes off a family chapter without sentimental release.
Lena chooses a pragmatic future over the fantasy of full restitution.
pressure_source: rent, work, partial repayments, and the impossibility of complete repair
